name: Gemini
description: Delegate work to Gemini when the task benefits from very large context windows, multimodal input handling, broad source synthesis, or Google-native reasoning strengths.
not_for: routine local edits or direct repo implementation
simple questions that do not need delegation
tool-dependent tasks Gemini cannot actually perform
unreviewed pass-through of model output as final truth
typical_inputs: research question or decision to support
large source pack or multimodal materials
